message:
fix(tx): harden resume safety, add compensation step results, persist contract state

Resume: reject unsafe checkpoint replays with UnsafeResume error,
correct AlreadyComplete when last step failed, use compiled_plan_from_contract
instead of hollow stub, add resume_terminal_outcome helper.

Compensation: populate per-step TxCommitStepResult with Committed/Failed/
Skipped outcomes for observability parity with commit phase.

MCP tools: persist TX contract to disk after commit/compensation/rollback
with updated lifecycle_state, outcome, and receipts. Fix final_state for
full rollback to "rolled_back" (was "compensated"). Add mcp_tx_outcome_for_state
and mcp_save_mission_tx_contract_to_path helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -73,6 +73,27 @@ pub(super) fn mcp_load_mission_tx_contract_from_path(
     Ok(contract)
 }
 
+pub(super) fn mcp_save_mission_tx_contract_to_path(
+    path: &Path,
+    contract: &crate::plan::MissionTxContract,
+) -> std::result::Result<(), McpToolError> {
+    let json = serde_json::to_string_pretty(contract).map_err(|err| {
+        McpToolError::new(
+            "robot.tx_serialize_failed",
+            format!("Failed to serialize tx contract: {err}"),
+            None,
+        )
+    })?;
+
+    std::fs::write(path, json).map_err(|err| {
+        McpToolError::new(
+            "robot.tx_write_failed",
+            format!("Failed to write tx contract file {}: {err}", path.display()),
+            None,
+        )
+    })
+}
+
 pub(super) fn mcp_parse_mission_kill_switch(
     raw: Option<&str>,
 ) -> std::result::Result<crate::plan::MissionKillSwitchLevel, McpToolError> {
